name: market-suggestion-extension
description: Chrome extension that suggests relevant markets on Kalshi based on webpage content with real-time API integration

scripts.build: npm run build:config && cp node_modules/node-forge/dist/forge.min.js lib/forge.min.js
scripts.install-extension: echo 'Load the extension in Chrome by going to chrome://extensions/ and enabling Developer mode, then click Load unpacked and select this directory'

author: Your Name
